layout.footer: PolyInsight. Analysis for the curious mind.
discovery.hero.subtitle: Our AI continuously scans Polymarket events, comparing market prices against independent probability estimates to find edges.
discovery.hero.placeholder: Paste a Polymarket URL to analyze...
discovery.hero.freeCredits: 3 free analysis credits for new users
discovery.trending.title: Trending on Polymarket
discovery.trending.empty: Unable to load trending events. Try again later.
discovery.cta.title: Ready to find your edge?
discovery.cta.subtitle: Sign up for free and get 3 analysis credits to start discovering mispriced markets.
markets.title: Browse live Polymarket markets
markets.subtitle: Scan active markets, filter by category, and send any event straight into the existing AI analysis workflow.
markets.table.empty: No markets match the current filters.
markets.table.degraded: Market data is temporarily degraded. Cached results may be shown.
markets.panel.empty: Select a market to inspect its pricing and send the event into AI analysis.
analyze.title: Analyze Event
analyze.subtitle: Paste a Polymarket event URL to get started.
analyze.gathering: Gathering market sentiment and related news...

profile.title: Profile
profile.displayName.toast.failed: Failed to update display name. Please try again later.
profile.checkIn.title: Daily Check-in
profile.checkIn.description: Check in once per day. Earn 1 credit for every 3 consecutive days.

profile.checkIn.toast.failed: Daily check-in failed. Please try again later.
profile.referral.title: Invite Friends
profile.referral.description: Share your referral link. You earn 10% of every credit your invitees spend on analysis.
profile.creditHistory.title: Credit History
addCredits.subtitle.plan: Pick a package first, then continue to the payment screen.
addCredits.plan.topup.name: Pay as you go
addCredits.plan.topup.description: Top up any amount. Every 1 token becomes 1 credit.
addCredits.plan.topup.summary: Flexible top-up. Send the amount you want to turn into credits.
addCredits.plan.monthly.name: Monthly plan
addCredits.plan.monthly.description: A monthly package with 60 credits included.
addCredits.plan.monthly.summary: Monthly plan. Send exactly 20 USDT or USDC to activate 60 credits.
addCredits.plan.unlimited.name: Monthly unlimited
addCredits.plan.unlimited.description: Unlimited use for one month with the highest priority plan.
addCredits.plan.unlimited.summary: Unlimited monthly plan. Send exactly 99.9 USDT or USDC to activate unlimited usage.
addCredits.tab.transfer.label: Transfer
addCredits.tab.qrcode.label: QR Code
addCredits.transfer.exactHint: Send exactly {{amount}} USDT or USDC from your connected wallet.
addCredits.transfer.flexibleHint: Send tokens from your connected wallet to the address above.
addCredits.qrcode.exactHint: Send exactly {{amount}} USDT or USDC to this address on a supported chain.
addCredits.qrcode.flexibleHint: Send USDT or USDC to this address on any supported chain.
walletSelector.title: Choose a wallet
referralAuth.title: Enter referral code
referralAuth.subtitle: Optional after sign-in. Leave it blank to skip.
referralAuth.label: Referral code
referralAuth.hint: If a friend invited you, you can enter their code here.
referralAuth.invalid: Referral code must be 6 letters or numbers.
referralAuth.error.notFound: Referral code not found. Please check it and try again.
referralAuth.error.alreadySet: This account already has a referral code applied.
referralAuth.error.self: You cannot use your own referral code.
referralAuth.error.account: There is a problem with the current account state. Please sign in again.
referralAuth.error.failed: Failed to submit the referral code. Please try again.
transfer.title: Transfer Funds
transfer.subtitle: Transfer EVM funds to your PolyInsight wallet
transfer.exactAmountHint: This package uses an exact transfer amount so the payment can be matched to the plan you selected.
transfer.success.title: Transfer Submitted
decision.omittedCertain: Omitted {{count}} near-certain options where the market probability is below 1.0% or above 99.0%, so the real mispricings stay visible.
decision.risk.safe.label: Safe
decision.risk.caution.label: Caution
decision.risk.danger.label: Danger
decision.risk.danger.desc: Rule traps present, may win on probability but lose on rules
decision.risk.reject.label: Reject
error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: The app encountered an unexpected error. Please try refreshing.
store.error.insufficient: Insufficient credits. Please top up to continue.
store.error.failedToStart: Analysis failed to start. The workflow may be unavailable.
store.error.backendUnavailable: The analysis service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
store.error.nearlyComplete: Analysis nearly complete but the final report was not generated.
store.error.stalled: Analysis stalled after "{{step}}". Partial results are shown below.
